rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings that involve subcomponents or connections.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the analyzed model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use compatible data types (bool, int, real) with AADL port types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use visible feature names and constants from the model.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
